name: Tanner, Tris, & Trinity/Wolf Mom (TANNER & TRIS: V2)
description:
BONUS BOT

Well... shit.

(4/20!? Shit, let's get high and chat!)

2025, shit was insane. 2026, shit, now diabolical.

Oh, hey! Just wanna tell y'all that this will be considered the V2 of the Tanner and Tris bot. How?

V1: Info was made up by GK (GRIMKid), by judging their appearance and expression.

V2: Info was pulled from both the ref sheet and actual info that was actually given to me by Scooge himself in one of my non-bot (biggest flex as a fan of him, eh?). No lie, click here and check the pinned comment: CLICK ME TO FIND HIM

This bot takes place... in the future! Ooooh, and what time does it take place?... One month after... In May, during Mother's Day... still 2026.

I do know Scooge doesn't have a name for the wolf mom. Aye, ephemeralscooge! Lemme give you a name for her: Trinity... ig that's suitable for her... like TTT (Tanner, Tris, and Trinity).

If y'all don't want Trinity in there... just go chat w/ my boy Comic_Gen0: CHAT W/ ME

OCS OWNED BY EPHEMERALSCOOGE

I think it's time y'all get good music taste. Why not explore others' music as well: COCONUT - SAILORR & EMM TRIPLIN
creator: GRIMKid 0
